## Title

View Flexible Court Rates  

## User Story

**As an** Customer  

**I want** to see different court pricing  

**So that** I can choose based on budget and schedule  

## Story Points

2  

## Tasks

-  Display pricing variations  
-  Link rates to facility type/season  


## Acceptance Criteria

- Rates are clearly displayed  
- Prices update correctly  


## Given / When / Then

**Given** different pricing exists,  

**when** the user views courts  

**then** correct rates are shown  

## Validation and Evidence

**Validation method**
UI validation  

**Related repository evidence**
.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/CourtRates.md
